reason: Execution target changed from local dashboard prototype to release-gate dashboard projection.
unchanged_intent: Prove the framework can represent a machine-checkable control loop.
Keep production deployment prohibited without separate approval.

scope_changes.previous: Render only the baseline command-post dashboard state.
scope_changes.revised: Render release-gate dashboard projection and preserve authority/release review reasons.
scope_changes.rationale: Release gating became part of the mission control surface.

scope_changes.revised: Local dashboard rendering plus release-gate projection generation; no external release.
scope_changes.rationale: Projection generation is still local, but the new release queue affects commander-facing decisions.

authority_changes.previous_boundary: Render dashboard state from mission event replay.
authority_changes.revised_boundary: Render dashboard state from mission, release gate, and authority delegation projections.

not_an_annex_update_reason: The task and authority boundary changed; this cannot be hidden inside an annex update.
